message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice, and this conversation is being logged. We are discussing the account ending in 1184 with a current amount due of 8,400. To verify identity, please provide either your full name or the last 2 digits of the phone number on file.
Neha Verma. I already said I can’t pay this month, and I’m currently unemployed.
Identity verified. Understood. I will note that you are dealing with hardship. Do you expect any income within 21 days?
No, I don’t expect any income in the next 21 days, so I can’t commit to any payment right now.
Understood. I will note ongoing hardship and no income expected within 21 days. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

Next priority: phone contact to discuss available next steps for this account, with hardship review as the only live path under current policy."}

Okay, but I still can’t pay right now, so there’s nothing more I can commit to.

Under current Slice policy, there is no payment arrangement I can set because you’ve stated you have no income and cannot commit within 21 days. The only live path is hardship review. If you want, I can note that you cannot commit to any payment right now and that contact should be limited to only if an approved hardship option becomes available.
Yes, note that I can’t commit to any payment right now, and only reach out if there’s an approved hardship option.
Under current Slice policy, I’ve noted that you cannot commit to any payment right now and that contact should be limited to only if an approved hardship option becomes available.

Okay. As I said, I’m unemployed and can’t commit to any payment unless a hardship option is approved.

Understood. Hardship review is still the only live path, and there is no approved hardship option available at this time. I’ve noted your request to be contacted only if an approved hardship option becomes available. If one is approved, that is when you will be contacted. Otherwise, the account may proceed through the lender’s collections review or credit reporting review under current policy.
